heading: Today
text: Hazy, hot, and humid.  Any early showers northeast ending.  Very localized, strong afternoon or evening thunderstorms.  Highs in the upper 80s to mid 90s.  Winds south, becoming southwest to west 5 to 15 mph.

heading: Tonight
text: A localized evening thunderstorm, especially northeast, potentially strong.  A chance of a shower or storm late north.  Very warm and humid.  Lows in the upper 60s to mid 70s.  Winds southwest near 10 mph, diminishing to light and variable.

heading: Thursday
text: Hazy, hot, and humid.  An isolated morning shower, then isolated, strong afternoon or evening thunderstorms.  Highs in the upper 80s and 90s, a few extremes approaching 100 degrees. Winds light from the southwest, becoming west 5 to 10 mph.
